description_long: This object is a stylized, blocky airplane with a predominantly white fuselage and wings, reminiscent of a pixel art or voxel design. The wings are broad and sharply angled, with a black cockpit area near the front center. The tail section features a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with a colorful, rainbow-like trail extending from the rear, suggesting motion or a decorative effect. The airplane is positioned on a green rectangular base, which may represent grass or a runway. Small, blocky elements behind the airplane resemble exhaust or smoke, further emphasizing the sense of movement.
description: A blocky, white airplane with angled wings, a black cockpit, and a colorful trail on a green base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, pointed nose, black cockpit, and symmetrical wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the airplane's thin profile, colorful trail, and blocky exhaust elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, rainbow trail, and blocky exhaust behind the airplane.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the same features as view 1, showing the airplane's length and colorful trail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight, sharply angled wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the wings or fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit located at the front center of the fuselage.
